summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sixto Portal post-refactor. All features working correctly: login flows (admin/client), projects list, project detail with tabbed view, billing removal from client view, admin routes with sidebar.

issues: All projects show under 'COMPLETED' section since all test data has status Done/Lost - no 'Active Projects' section visible (expected behavior based on test data)

passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns ok with notion=connected
Backend: Admin magic link request returns mock_code
Backend: Client magic link request returns mock_code
Backend: Invalid email returns 404
Backend: Admin verify magic link returns token with role=admin
Backend: Client verify magic link returns token with role=client
Backend: /api/portal/projects returns projects WITHOUT estimated_amount (billing removed)
Backend: /api/portal/project/{id}/dashboard returns NO billing metrics (total_billed, total_paid, outstanding)
Backend: /api/portal/project/{id}/deliverables endpoint works
Backend: /api/portal/project/{id}/documents endpoint works
Backend: /api/portal/project/{id}/meetings endpoint works
Backend: /api/portal/project/{id}/updates endpoint works
Backend: /api/admin/billing still works for admin users
Backend: Client blocked from /api/admin/billing (403)
Backend: Logout endpoint works
Frontend: Login page loads with email form
Frontend: Admin login flow (email → mock code → verify → redirect to /projects)
Frontend: Client login flow (email → mock code → verify → redirect to /projects)
Frontend: Admin sees 5 projects on projects page
Frontend: Client sees 1 project (their own) on projects page
Frontend: Project cards show status badges (Done, Lost)
Frontend: Click project card navigates to /project/:id
Frontend: Project detail page loads with tabbed view
Frontend: Overview tab shows tasks count, deliverables count, progress bar
Frontend: Overview tab has NO billing data
Frontend: Deliverables tab loads
Frontend: Documents tab loads
Frontend: Meetings tab loads
Frontend: Updates tab loads
Frontend: Request tab has form with subject, type, priority, description fields
Frontend: Back button on project detail returns to /projects
Frontend: Logout button works from projects page
Frontend: Logout button works from project detail page
Frontend: Admin can access /admin routes with sidebar navigation
Frontend: Admin sidebar shows Overview, Projects, Clients, Billing, Portals, Access, Client View
Frontend: Admin billing page shows full billing data
Frontend: Client redirected from /admin to /projects (security working)
critical_code_review_comments: Magic link auth is MOCKED - mock_code returned in API response. Production should send actual emails.
All test projects have status Done/Lost - no active projects to test 'Active Projects' section grouping

test_credentials.auth_method: Magic link (MOCKED - code displayed in UI)

seed_data_creation: None - using live Notion API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major refactor completed: 1) Client view now uses ProjectsPage (list) and ProjectDetailPage (tabbed detail) instead of sidebar navigation. 2) Billing data removed from client-facing endpoints (/api/portal/projects and /api/portal/project/{id}/dashboard). 3) Admin routes still have sidebar and full billing access. 4) All 5 projects in test data have status Done or Lost. 5) Client arman@bluegateinc.com has 1 project (Glowback LED).

mocked_apis.magic_link_email: Email sending is MOCKED - mock_code returned directly in /api/auth/request-magic-link response
